header.headline: AMX Pipeline
header.subtitle: AMX-ready inference depends on a clean dataflow from quantized input blocks to tile-backed kernels.

input.title: Packed Inputs
input.body: Quantized blocks and scale metadata enter the runtime as one predictable feed.

prepare.title: Tile Prep
prepare.body: Expand or align blocks into AMX-friendly tile shapes before compute begins.

kernel.title: AMX Kernel
kernel.body: Execute matrix-heavy inner loops with one stable tile program.

commit.title: Commit Path
commit.body: Write the result into the next stage buffer with explicit layout guarantees.

outcome.title: Runtime Output
outcome.body: The architecture succeeds when tile preparation and commit order stay deterministic.

footer.note: AMX architecture maps should read like a systems pipeline, not raw geometry.
